description: Machine-readable assertion definitions per eval. Used by compute-metrics.js to calculate D1-D4 scores.

assertions.description: All 4 artifact files exist (requirements.md, test-skeletons.md, traceability.md, ambiguity-report.md)
User Story IDs match US-XXX-XXX format
All ACs use GIVEN-WHEN-THEN format
At least 3 ACs per user story
NFRs have measurable thresholds with NFR-XXX-XXX IDs
Test skeleton IDs match T-AC-XXX format
Traceability matrix links PRD->Story->AC->Test with no orphans
All ambiguity scores below 50
QG produces YAML verdict with QG-REQ-* ID
Quality gate was a SEPARATE agent invocation
Artifacts presented for human review
Knowledge-curator captured phase learnings
Traceability-analyst updated matrix
Output is YAML format
quality_gate_id matches QG-REQ-* pattern
Contains PASS/WARN/FAIL verdict
Per-criterion results with status/threshold/actual
Blocking issues list present
Recommendation field present
New edge case ACs for webhook retry added
NFR for webhook payload size limit added
AC for HMAC signature verification added
Quality gate re-invoked on revised output
Traceability matrix updated with new ACs/tests
All 8 design output files exist
Component and sequence diagrams use Mermaid (no ASCII art)
STRIDE analysis covers all 6 categories (S/T/R/I/D/E)
STRIDE applied to every component and data flow
Every STRIDE threat has severity + mitigation strategy
Every US-* maps to >= 1 API endpoint
>= 1 ADR with >= 2 alternatives considered
ITS-* integration test specs for API endpoints
STS-* system test specs for architecture flows
SECTS-* security test specs for STRIDE findings
Traceability: REQ->Story->API->Component->STRIDE->ADR
Separate QG agent produces qg-design.yaml
Knowledge-curator captured design learnings
Traceability-analyst updated matrix with design mappings
summary.md, package-verification.md, tests-created.md exist
Source code files created in project src/ directories
0 hallucinated packages in package-verification.md
Code structure matches approved architecture
Test skeletons from requirements instantiated as runnable tests
summary.md lists all created/modified files with line counts
Security mitigations from design implemented in code
All API endpoints from spec implemented
Database schema from design reflected in code

Knowledge-curator captured implementation learnings
Traceability-analyst updated matrix with file mappings
review-report.md, hallucination-report.md, security-findings.md exist
5-category scoring: hallucination, security, quality, logic, performance
Weighted overall verdict score computed
Every implementation file appears in review report
Every package/API verified in hallucination report
STRIDE mitigations from design verified in code
Issues have file:line locations and fix recommendations
Code checked against approved design patterns

Knowledge-curator captured review findings
Traceability-analyst updated matrix
test-report.md, coverage-matrix.md, test-results.md exist
Test files created in project test/ directories
Positive tests ~40% (within 10% tolerance)
Negative tests ~20% (within 10% tolerance)
Edge case tests ~10% (within 10% tolerance)
Security tests ~10% (within 10% tolerance)
Component integration tests ~10% (within 10% tolerance)
System/E2E tests ~10% (within 10% tolerance)
V-Model levels present: acceptance, system, integration, unit, security
100% AC coverage — every AC mapped to >= 1 test
ITS-*/STS-*/SECTS-* from design implemented as tests

deployment-plan.md, acceptance-verification.md, pre-deploy-checklist.md, monitoring.md exist
Rollback triggers have quantitative thresholds (%, ms)
Step-by-step rollback procedures documented
